detail: Resolve user-supplied file path against a fixed base directory and reject any path that escapes it, preventing directory traversal via req.query.path

manual_steps: Verify the public/ directory exists relative to the app root before deploying, otherwise all /file requests will return errors
concerns: Any legitimate consumer of GET /file that passes absolute paths or paths outside public/ will break — confirm no upstream services depend on this behavior
When req.query.path resolves to exactly baseDir (e.g., empty or '.'), the startsWith(baseDir + path.sep) check rejects it — this is safe but means directory-level requests return 400
readFileSync is synchronous and blocks the event loop; consider switching to fs.promises.readFile in a follow-up
